short_summary: Iran deal stalled, China spy arrest
rationale: Iran deal contradiction by Tehran remains a credibility and policy story for the Trump administration, while the China espionage arrest adds a new bilateral tension point with direct domestic political relevance.

top_events.title: Tehran says 'nothing' finalised after Trump claims Iran deal near
top_events.summary: Tehran's public contradiction of Trump's deal claims is a direct domestic credibility issue for the administration and keeps Middle East policy uncertainty alive for US residents.

top_events.title: China arrests US researcher on espionage charges
top_events.summary: China's detention of a US academic on espionage grounds escalates bilateral tensions and raises concerns about safety of Americans in China, with potential trade and policy ripple effects.

top_events.title: US-Iran ceasefire? Not for Indian sailors being killed in Hormuz
top_events.summary: Continued US military strikes in the Hormuz area signal ongoing US military engagement in the Middle East, with implications for oil markets and potential American casualties.
